_description: Meta-fixture for self-test/run.sh. Contains one case that MUST pass and one that MUST fail. Used by the runner-meta case in golden-cases.example.json to regression-test the runner itself.

cases._description: Deliberately trivial all-green script case. Exercises expected_exit, expected_stdout_jq, and expected_stderr_contains happy paths.
Deliberately broken — step 2 exits 1 where we expect 0. Exercises the failure-report path so runner-meta can assert nonzero exit + clear error message.
